category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a symbolic manipulation system; official FORM repository describes symbolic manipulation of very big expressions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is form; official project and documentation style the system as FORM.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official FORM website; official GitHub README points to the FORM website and wiki for background and courses.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/form-dev/form; per instruction, repo is not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, executables, and official FORM repository describe a command-line symbolic manipulation system.
